summary: Elric makes a spectacular debut as a Merwinger, impressing the leading family of the Hexacle, the Nerestas. However, things take a turn when Elric's sister arrives and scolds him for his behavior during the election. Meanwhile, Elric discovers a mysterious maze filled with magical traps and winds, which seem to be connected to the Nerestas' magic. The story takes an unexpected turn as Elric realizes he is being watched and tries to escape the maze.
key_moments: Elric makes his debut as a Merwinger
Elric's sister arrives and scolds him
Elric discovers a mysterious maze with magical traps
